bird.name: 蓝肩裸鼻雀
bird.summary: 蓝肩裸鼻雀（台湾作天藍肩裸鼻雀，学名：Thraupis cyanoptera），是雀形目裸鼻雀科的一种鸟类。 蓝肩裸鼻雀体重约43.3克，翼长约96.1毫米，嘴峰长约17.9毫米，喙宽度约6.4毫米，喙厚度约7.8毫米，跗蹠长约20.8毫米，尾长约66.5毫米。蓝肩裸鼻雀在其分…

locations.name: 路易·皮埃尔·维埃约
locations.summary: 路易·皮埃尔·维埃约（法語：Louis Pierre Vieillot，1748年5月10日—1830年8月24日）是法国的鳥類學家。 维埃约是第一批用卡尔·林奈式二名法科学描述鸟类的研究者之一。至少有26个他命名的鸟类至今仍在学术界使用…

locations.name: 次生林
locations.summary: 次生林，又名天然次生林、再生林、再生森林、二次林。是指原始穩定的森林植被遭到人類活動干擾（刀耕火種、林木砍伐）或同等破壞性的自然現象之後，主要透過自然過程再生形成的森林或林地區域。其特徵有別於未曾遭受近期干擾的原始森林、複雜的早期遷移階段…

locations.name: 聖卡塔琳娜島
locations.summary: 聖卡塔琳娜島（Ilha de Santa Catarina）是巴西南岸的島嶼，位於聖卡塔琳娜州，島嶼長約54公里，寬18公里，面積424.4平方公里，2010年統計人口421,203。聖卡塔琳娜島與巴西大陸之間有三條橋連接。

locations.name: 馬爾山脈
locations.summary: 馬爾山脈（英語：Serra do Mar，[ˈsɛʁɐ du ˈmaɾ]，葡萄牙語為Sea's ridge或Sea ridge）是一座巴西的山脈和斷崖，位於該國東南部，總長達1500公里。 至今，馬爾山脈是巴西大西洋森林最大的生物迴廊。當…

relations.subject: 蓝肩裸鼻雀
relations.evidence: The azure-shouldered tanager (Thraupis cyanoptera) is a species of bird in the tanager family, Thraupidae

relations.subject: 蓝肩裸鼻雀
relations.evidence: It inhabits humid montane forests, open woodlands, secondary growth, and forest edges and can be found at elevations of up to , but usually stays below

relations.subject: 蓝肩裸鼻雀
relations.evidence: The azure-shouldered tanager prefers forested habitats more than other Thraupis tanagers and inhabits humid montane forests, open woodlands, secondary growth, and forest edges. On Santa Catarina Island, it has also been recorded from orchards. It is mainly found on the Atlantic slopes of Serra do Mar

relations.subject: 蓝肩裸鼻雀
relations.evidence: It is mainly a species of humid forest and is less adept at utilizing secondary forest and forest edges than other species in its genus, which has contributed to a large decline in its range. Historically, the lowland forests this species inhabits were threatened by deforestation caused by agriculture, mining, and plantations
relations.object_summary: 原生林被砍伐导致栖息地面积和连通性下降。
